title: Battery life on these earbuds is terrible
body: I charge them every night and they still die by lunch. So annoying, I hate it.

title: Battery drains so fast
body: Battery is terrible, I hate how quickly it dies. Worst purchase.

title: Wish it had a case with wireless charging
body: I wish it had wireless charging built into the case, would be so much better.

title: These are actually really comfortable
body: I love how comfortable these are, best fit I've had, highly recommend.

title: Comparing to AirPods Pro
body: Compared to AirPods Pro these feel cheaply made, switched from AirPods and regret it.
